sections.paragraph:
נֵאֹות see יֵאֹותוּ .

נֵאשֲׁאַר Eze 9:8, a form compounded of two readings, which are actually found in MSS. and printed editions (נִשְׁאַר and אֶשְׁאַר).

נָבֹזָה 1Sa 14:36, for נָבֹזָּה fut. Kal, from בָּזַז, with Dagesh rejected.

נִבֵּיתִי for נִבֵּאתִי pret. Niphal, from נִבָּא to prophesy.

נָבֶל, וַנָּבֶל we fade, Isa 64:5, for וַנַּבֶּל, from the root נָבַל.

נָֽבְלָה for נָבֹלָּה fut. Kal, from בָּלַל. § 66, 5, and note 11. Lehrg. 372.

נָֽבְקָה for נָבַקָּה pret. Niphal, from בָּקַק ibid.

נְגאֲלוּ Isa 59:3 Lam 4:14 see Niphal גָּאַל No. II.

נִדְּמָה Jer 8:14, for נִדַּמָּה fut. Niphal, from דָּמַם No. II. Compare § 66, 5, and note 11.

נְהִי, וַנְּהִי 1 pl. fut. apoc. Kal, from הָיָה to be.

נוּגִים, const. נוּגֵי fem. נוּגֹות, part. Niphal, from יָגָה for נֹוגִים, etc.

נוּלְּדוּ pret. Niphal, from יָלַד, for נֹולְדוּ with Dag. euphon.

נִוַּסְּרוּ Eze 23:48, prob. for נִתְוַסְּרוּ Nithpael (in the Rabbinic form), Lehrg. 249.

נִחַל pret. Niphal, from חָלַל; also, pret. Piel, from נָחַל.

נִחַם pret. Niphal and Piel, from נָחַם.

נֵחָמִים part. Niphal pl. from חָמַם, for נִחַמִּים.

נֵחַנְתָּ 2 pret. Niphal, from חָנַן.

נִחַר pret. Niphal, from חָרַר to burn up.

נִחַת pret. Niphal, from חָתַת to tear asunder.

נִינָם 1 fut. Kal, from יָנָה, with suff. -ָם.

נִירָם, וַנִּירָם 1 plur. fut. Kal, from יָרָה, with suff. -ָם.

נַךְ, וַנַּךְ 1 plur. fut. Hiphil, apoc. from נָכָה to strike.

נֹכַחַת part. Niphal, f., from יָכַח to rebuke.

נִכַּפֵּר Deu 21:8, Nithpael, from כָּפַר, Lehrg. 249.

נָמַר pret. Niphal, from מוּר (a form taken from מָרַר).

נָֽסְבָה for נָסַבָּה pret. Niphal, from סָבַב, § 66, 5, and note 11, Lehrg. 372.

נְסָה Psa 4:7, for נְשָׂא imp. from נָשָׂא, the orthography not being regarded.

נֵעֹור pret. Niphal, from the root עוּר No. II.

נִפְלְאַ֫תָה for נִפְלְאָה with ה parag., 2Sa 1:26, Lehrg. 266.

נִפְלַל Pilel, from נָפַל.

נִצְטַדַּק 1 pl. fut. Hithpael, from צָדַק for נִצְתַּדַּק, נִחְצַדַּק.

נִצְּרָה for נִצְרָה imp. Kal, with ה parag. from נָצַר, with dag. euphon., Psa 141:3.

נָקֵל pret. Niphal, from קָלַל.

נָשׂוּ Eze 39:26, and נָשׂוּא (Aleph being added; compare Arab. قتلوا) Psa 139:20, for נָֽשְׂאוּ they bear.

נָשׂוּי Psa 32:1, for נָשׂוּא part. pass. Kal, from נָשָׂא, inflected like verbs לה֞ so as to be similar in sound to כָּסוּי, which stands near it.

נָשִּׁים 1 plur. fut. Hiphil, from שָׁמַם in the Chald. form.

נִשְׁתָּוָה Nithpael, from שָׁוָה No. II., which see.

נְתַקְּנוּהוּ for נְתַקְנוּהוּ, dag. euphon.

נָתַתִּי for נָתַנְתִּי pret. Kal, from נָתַן to give.
